home_description: A simple starting point for navigating the app while the product surface is still taking shape.
dashboard_title: Ask the AI to move work forward.
dashboard_description: This will become the place where signed-in users talk to the connected AI, request organizational actions, and start workflows within their permissions.
dashboard_chat_input_placeholder: Ask what needs to happen in this organization...
dashboard_chat_footer_note: AI orchestration, persistence, and action execution are TBD. Sending is disabled until those boundaries exist.
sign_in_description: Use your account credentials to continue into the workspace.
auth_email_description: Use the email address tied to your account.
auth_password_description: Enter the password for this workspace account.
auth_name_description: Use the name that should appear inside the workspace.
auth_confirm_password_description: Re-enter the password to avoid typos.
auth_sign_out_description: You will need to sign in again to keep working in the workspace.
auth_sign_out_error: We could not sign you out. Please try again.
auth_generic_error: We could not complete this request. Please try again.
not_found_title: We could not find that page.
not_found_description: The link may be outdated, the URL may have changed, or the page may simply not exist yet.
sign_up_description: Start with a workspace-ready account and continue into the app.
auth_checking_description: Please wait while we verify your authentication state.
validation_role_name_min: Role key must be at least {count} characters.
validation_role_name_max: Role key must be at most {count} characters.
validation_role_name_pattern: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
validation_organization_name_min: Organization name must be at least {count} characters.
validation_organization_name_max: Organization name must be at most {count} characters.
validation_organization_slug_min: Organization slug must be at least {count} characters.
validation_organization_slug_max: Organization slug must be at most {count} characters.
validation_organization_slug_pattern: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
validation_member_role_required: Select a role for this member.
organization_list_generic_error: We could not load your organizations. Please try again.
organization_set_active_generic_error: We could not switch organizations. Please try again.
organization_members_generic_error: We could not load your organization members. Please try again.
organization_roles_generic_error: We could not load your organization roles. Please try again.
roles_description: Browse the organization roles that define access and permissions for this workspace.
roles_empty_description: This organization does not have any roles to show.
roles_loading_description: Fetching the current organization role list.
roles_error_description: We could not load the roles for this organization right now.
roles_create_description: Define a new organization role and choose which permissions it can grant.
roles_create_card_description: Enter a role key and select the permissions it should carry in the active organization.
roles_create_role_description: Use a unique identifier like project-editor or support-lead.
roles_create_permissions_description: Only actions your current role already has are available to select.
roles_create_permissions_locked_descript: This resource is shown with the actions your current role can grant.
roles_create_success_description: The new role is now available inside this organization.
roles_create_success_body: You can create another role or go back to the roles list.
roles_create_generic_error: We could not create this role. Please try again.
roles_create_no_access_description: Your current role does not include the permission needed to create new roles.
roles_update_description: Update the role key and the permissions it can grant inside the active organization.
roles_update_card_description: Change the role key or its permission matrix for the active organization.
roles_update_role_description: Use a unique identifier like project-editor or support-lead.
roles_update_permissions_description: Only actions your current role already has are available to select.
roles_update_generic_error: We could not update this role. Please try again.
roles_update_no_access_description: Your current role does not include the permission needed to update roles.
roles_update_not_found_description: We could not find that role in the active organization.
roles_delete_confirm_description: Deleting {role} will permanently remove this role from the organization.
roles_delete_generic_error: We could not delete this role. Please try again.
roles_delete_no_access_description: Your current role does not include the permission needed to delete roles.
roles_permission_available_description: Your current role can grant this action.
roles_permission_locked_description: Your current role cannot grant this action.
organization_create_description: Create the first organization workspace that the authenticated user can work inside.
organization_create_card_description: The organization name powers the display label, and the slug becomes the durable route-friendly identifier.
organization_create_name_description: This is the human-readable name that will appear in the app.
organization_create_slug_description: This becomes the URL-safe identifier. You can edit it before creating the organization.
organization_create_generic_error: We could not create this organization. Please try again.
organization_access_title: Create an organization or review invitations.
organization_access_description: Use this page when you need to start a new workspace or join one through a pending invitation.
organization_invitations_section_descrip: Pending invitations that were sent to your account show up here.
organization_invitations_empty_descripti: If someone invites you later, the invitation will appear here.
organization_invitations_error_descripti: We could not load your invitations right now.
organization_invitations_reject_descript: Rejecting will remove this invitation for {organization}.
organization_invitations_generic_error: We could not complete this invitation action. Please try again.
members_description: Browse the people currently in the active organization.
members_empty_description: This organization does not have any members to show.
members_loading_description: Fetching the current organization membership list.
members_error_description: We could not load the members for this organization right now.
members_edit_description: Change the role for this organization member.
members_edit_card_description: Choose the role this member should have in the active organization.
members_edit_role_description: Select one of the organization roles below.
members_edit_generic_error: We could not update this member. Please try again.
members_edit_no_access_description: Your current role does not include the permission needed to update members.
members_edit_not_found_description: We could not find that member in the active organization.
members_remove_confirm_description: Removing {member} will revoke their access to the active organization.
members_remove_confirm_error: We could not remove this member. Please try again.
members_remove_no_access_description: Your current role does not include the permission needed to remove members.
organization_invite_description: Send an invitation to add a person to the active organization.
organization_invite_card_description: Enter the email address and we will send the Better Auth invitation for the current organization.
organization_invite_email_description: Use the address the person will use to sign in or accept the invitation.
organization_invite_success_description: The user will receive an invitation email for this organization.
organization_invite_success_body: You can go back to the members overview or send another invitation.
organization_invite_generic_error: We could not send this invitation. Please try again.
organization_invite_no_access_descriptio: Your current role does not include the permission needed to invite new members.
settings_description: Adjust the preferences that belong to your account.
settings_preferences_description: Choose the display language you want to use in the app.
